ddls:
CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police station */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the provinces table */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the police station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the police station */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the police station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the crime category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the police stations table */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the crime categories table */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the crime data belongs to */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of crimes reported for the specified year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (analyst, researcher, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data source */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data collection methods table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the crime data table */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the data sources table */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)
